candidate_check.description: Microsoft Defender AV must monitor file and program activity.

check_content_excerpt: Verify the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> Real-time Protection >> Monitor file and program activity on your computer is set to "Enabled"; otherwise, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Set the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> Real-time Protection >> Monitor file and program activity on your computer to "Enabled".

Click "OK".

Click "Apply".
title: Microsoft Defender AV must monitor file and program activity.
